description: git-directory-is-worktree returns 0 inside a linked worktree
steps: Create a temp git repo with an initial commit
Add a linked worktree via git worktree add
cd into the linked worktree directory

description: git-directory-is-worktree returns 1 in the Git Repo Main
steps: Create a temp git repo with an initial commit

description: git-directory-is-worktree returns 1 outside any git repo
steps: cd into a directory that is not a git repo

description: git-worktree-main returns Git Repo Main path from inside a linked worktree
steps: Create a temp git repo with an initial commit
Verify output is the absolute path of the original repo

description: git-worktree-main returns own path when called from the Git Repo Main
steps: Create a temp git repo with an initial commit
Verify output is the repo root path

description: git-worktree-list-raw outputs branch and path for each worktree
steps: Create a temp git repo with two linked worktrees

description: git-worktree-list-raw excludes the Git Repo Main from output
steps: Create a temp git repo with one linked worktree
Run git-worktree-list-raw from the repo root
Verify the main repo path does not appear in output

description: git-worktree-list-raw works from inside a linked worktree
steps: Create a temp git repo with two linked worktrees
cd into one of the worktrees
Verify both worktrees appear in output

description: git-worktree-create creates a worktree directory with the correct name
git-worktree-create creates the branch if it does not exist
steps: Create a temp git repo with no branches other than main
Verify the branch fix/new-branch now exists in the repo

description: git-worktree-create is idempotent when worktree already exists
steps: Verify exit code is 0 on second run

description: git-worktree-create cds into the created worktree
git-worktree-create converts branch name slashes to underscores in directory name
steps: Verify directory name contains underscores instead of slashes

description: git-worktree-list displays branch names without file paths
steps: Create a temp git repo with two worktrees
Verify output does not contain any file paths

description: git-worktree-switch cds into a worktree by branch name
steps: Create a temp git repo with a linked worktree on fix/bug
From the repo root, run git-worktree-switch fix/bug
Verify current directory is the worktree path

description: git-worktree-switch cds to the Git Repo Main when argument is 'main'
steps: Create a temp git repo with a linked worktree
Verify current directory is the Git Repo Main path

description: git-worktree-delete removes the worktree directory
steps: Create a temp git repo with a linked worktree on fix/bug
Verify the worktree directory no longer exists

description: git-worktree-delete does not delete the branch
steps: Create a temp git repo with a linked worktree on fix/bug
Verify the branch fix/bug still exists in the repo

description: git-worktree-delete cds to Git Repo Main when called from inside the deleted worktree
steps: Create a temp git repo with a linked worktree
Run git-worktree-delete with the current branch
Verify current directory has changed to the Git Repo Main

description: complete-git-worktrees includes worktrees of the current repo
steps: Create a temp git repo with a worktree on fix/bug

description: complete-git-worktrees always includes 'main'
steps: Create a temp git repo with a worktree
Verify 'main' appears in output regardless of existing worktrees

description: complete-git-worktrees excludes worktrees from other repos
steps: Create two separate git repos each with a worktree
Verify only repo A's worktrees appear, not repo B's

description: OROSHI_WORKTREES_DIR environment variable is exported
vwtc, vwtl, vwts, vwtR aliases exist and point to correct functions
steps: Run which vwtc, vwtl, vwts, vwtR
Verify each alias resolves to its corresponding git-worktree-* function

description: git_is_worktree prompt part is non-empty inside a linked worktree
steps: Create a temp git repo with a linked worktree

description: git_is_worktree prompt part is empty in the Git Repo Main
